<user_query>
Search the codebase at /Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next for:

1. The Playwright test configuration - find playwright.config.ts and understand the baseURL and test setup
2. How the integration tests interact with forms - search for `fill`, `type`, `insertText`, `keyboard`, `getByRole("textbox")` patterns in tests/integration/
3. Read the full test fixture at tests/integration/test-fixture.ts
4. Check if there are any other form pages in the app that have integration tests - look at other .spec.ts files
5. Look at the current form in src/routes/_authed/workspace/new.tsx - specifically how the form handles submission and state

Return all relevant file paths, code snippets, and patterns found.
</user_query>

Searching the org-next app for Playwright config, test patterns, fixtures, and the workspace form.
